title: 4 Rolls Silver Glitter Resin Rhinestone Ribbons Self-Adhesive Belt Sparkling Diamond Bling Stickers Wrap Crystal Roll for DIY Arts Crafts,10mm
features: What You Get: you will receive 4 rolls silver crystal rhinestone diamond ribbons in width of 10mm.The length of each roll is 1 yard, a total of 4 yards, can meet your different decoration needs in daily life and can also be shared with friends or family members of craft enthusiasts.

High Quanlity : Electroplating process to ensure the brightness and uniformity of each diamond surface, exquisite workmanship, smooth and flat, classic shape design is more three-dimensional, shining in the light, beautiful and delicate; Diamond bling ribbon roll viscosity is good, it is not easy to fall off and can be easily pasted on any product with a smooth surface, adding a good charm to your artwork.

Bling and Glitter Effect: The self-adhesive crystal rhinestone ribbon is shiny under the light, beautiful and delicate, making your crafts more attractive; And the rhinestones are in classic shapes that make them look more three-dimensional, adding a touch of glamour to your art works,or matched with your decors, can bring you a dazzling and glitter effect.

Easy to Use: you can trim the crystal self adhesive ribbon to the shape and length according to your like, just tear off the back paper of the sticker and press it on the required surface to get a beautiful decorative effect; Warm reminder, please within 48 hours after pasting Do not touch water or other liquids.

Wide Applicable: This bling rhinestone ribbon is suitable for many holiday decorations, wedding decorations, bridal veils, costumes, costumes, cake decorations, candles, vases, clothing and plastic items, which can be decorated in your home, office, garden, car and other places; Besides, you can also design personalized phone cases with the rhinestone ribbon.
description: Self Adhesive Diamond Ribbon Shiny DIY gifts:You can use the resin rhinestone ribbon to DIY different crafts as gifts to give your friends or family on christmas, birthdays and orther festivals. More using method:Apart from sticking the self adhesive diamond ribbon on your items directly, you can also use an iron machine to iron the ribbon on your things, or sew it on your items, which can increase the serving time. Package includes: You will receive 4 rolls of diamond strips, each of which is 1 yard long; the width are 10mm. We provide four colors for you to choose---silver, silverAB, gold, blackAB,black,red and blue! Notes: The surface of the diamond may be atomized in the process of transportation, which does not affect the use. If you feel that the surface of the diamond is not bright enough, please gently wipe the surface of the diamond with a towel soaked in water. They will shine again. please do not touch water or other liquid in 48 hours after pasting. The diamond mesh wrap roll does not include actual diamonds or crystals.
